reviews.text: This route was absolutely amazing. The OSRM planner helped me navigate perfectly, highly recommended for road trips!
Great experience overall. The community alerts saved me from a major traffic jam near Pune. Will use RouteNest again!
I loved the verified community feature. Knowing that other travelers recently went on this route gave me a lot of confidence.
The smart notifications are a lifesaver. Kept me updated about weather conditions. Very smooth journey.
Nice and easy to use app. The road was well mapped out. I just wish there were more food stops marked.
Absolutely fantastic trip. The reviews and forums helped me plan my itinerary perfectly. Great community!
A bit of a bumpy ride, but the app navigated me through the safest paths. Thumbs up for the live route planner.
Saved my weekend trip! Real-time alerts are extremely accurate. Best travel app I have used so far.
Very helpful community. People are active and the route suggestions are top notch. Had a great family trip.
The scenery was beautiful and the navigation was flawless. I highly recommend this app to anyone taking a road trip in India.
Good experience, the app works very smoothly. I left a few alerts on the way to help others too.
Perfect companion for our short trip. We avoided all the bad roads thanks to the active community members.
